kings_guild.name: The King's Guild
kings_guild.description: Master artisans of the King's Guild each ply a different trade in a different quarter of the city. Work out who's who.
clues: Beatrix's levy is exactly 4 coins more than the Weaver.
Edmund's levy is immediately below the artisan who makes Saddles.
Aldric and the artisan with 12 coins are in the same guild.
The Potter and the artisan serving the Knight are in the same ward.
The artisan serving the Baron belongs to the Hill Ward.
The artisan who makes Horseshoes' levy is immediately below the Weaver.
The artisan who makes Pottery does not belong to the Hill Ward.
The artisan serving the Bishop's levy is lower than both the artisan who makes Saddles and the artisan in Kingsford.
Earl goes with exactly two of Potter, Saddles, Kingsford, and 10 coins.
The artisan who makes Pottery's levy is between the artisan in Eastcheap and Wulfric.
The artisan in Highrow's levy is between the artisan serving the Knight and the Potter.

fishing.name: The Fishing Derby
fishing.description: Anglers at the lake-country derby each landed a different fish from a different pond on a different lure. Work out who caught what, and where.
clues: Dale's weight is exactly 4 lb more than the angler who landed the Perch.
Gus' weight is immediately below the angler using the Wobbler.
Cody and the catch with 10 lb are in the same family.
The angler who landed the Crappie and the angler fishing with Shrimp are in the same watershed.
The angler fishing with Leech belongs to the South Watershed.
The angler using the Spinnerbait's weight is immediately below the angler who landed the Perch.
The angler using the Spoon does not belong to the South Watershed.
The angler fishing with Minnow's weight is lower than both the angler using the Wobbler and the angler at Stillwater.
Nightcrawler goes with exactly two of Crappie, Wobbler, Stillwater, and 8 lb.
The angler using the Spoon's weight is between the angler at Mossbank and Royce.
The angler at Pinehollow's weight is between the angler fishing with Shrimp and the angler who landed the Crappie.
